description_long: This object is a decorative candle featuring a vibrant red cylindrical wax candle set into a textured, ribbed white spherical holder. The holder has a seashell-like appearance with evenly spaced vertical grooves and a slightly metallic or ceramic finish. The candle itself is short, with a visible white wick protruding from the top, and is firmly embedded in the center of the holder. The back of the holder reveals a flat, circular base, likely for stability, with a slightly recessed area that may be unglazed or unfinished. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and coastal aesthetics, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings. The materials and craftsmanship indicate it is intended as a decorative accent, possibly for tabletops or outdoor patios.
description: A red wax candle with a visible wick is set into a ribbed, white spherical holder with a flat base, giving it a decorative and modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red candle and wick prominently centered in the ribbed white holder.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical shape of the red candle and the full curvature of the ribbed holder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, circular base of the holder and the absence of the candle's wick.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing both the ribbed texture of the holder and the flat base, with the candle extending outward.
